HGSS.645.0001:
Hello? I can’t hear you very well...
We must have a bad connection...\f
Try calling me again from a different
location, please.
HGSS.645.0002:
Hello... How are you?
I’m doing well, thanks.\f
HGSS.645.0003:
There are so many other Trainers out
there who are much stronger than me...\r
You should challenge them and see.
HGSS.645.0004:
Let’s see...
I’m usually free on Wednesdays\r
around noon. I could spare some time...\f
Why don’t you call me again then...
HGSS.645.0005:
Amphy’s gotten better lately. I’ve also
been able to take some time to myself.\f
What do you think? Would you like to
battle me again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.645.0006:
Got it...
Well, I’ll see you in Saffron City at the\r
Fighting Dojo, OK?
HGSS.645.0008:
Huh?\f
Before you battle me again, don’t you
have other appointments to keep?
HGSS.645.0009:
Got it. I’ll be waiting at the Fighting
Dojo in Saffron City.\r
I’ll see you there.
HGSS.645.0010:
This is Jasmine.
How do I sound? Healthy?\f
HGSS.645.0011:
You didn’t forget about your promise to
meet me for a battle, did you?\f
I’m still waiting for you at the Fighting
Dojo in Saffron City...
HGSS.645.0012:
Have you been to the Lighthouse lately?\f
I’ve been so busy myself. I haven’t
been able to get over there to see\r
Amphy much...\f
But...whenever I see the Lighthouse’s
lights at night, I always think,\r
“I hope you’re doing well, Amphy.”
HGSS.645.0013:
Um...
There’s something I’ve been meaning to\r
ask you... What did you think of my Gym?\r
Was the atmosphere a little strange?\f
But...I mean, steel always looks
pretty cold and uninviting, but I was\r
trying to make it at least a little cute.
HGSS.645.0014:
Warden Baoba at the Safari Zone...
He came over to my Gym once to\r
introduce himself...\f
He talks a little differently, doesn’t
he? I heard it’s called anastrophe...
